title: Nippon Ant Killer Powder,400g
features: Nippon Ant Killer Powder 300g + 33% extra free - 5NI400
Long lasting - up to 6 months control
Highly efficient ant and crawling insect killer, also destroys wasp nests
description: Product Description Nippon Ant Killer Powder 300g + 33% extra free - 5NI400 Ingredients Contains 0.448% W/w Permethrin Safety Warning Children and pets need not be excluded from treated areas general precautionary phrases this material and its container must be disposed of in a safe way. Do not contaminate foodstuffs, eating utensils or food contact surfaces. Do not breathe dust. Do not empty into drains. Do not contaminate ground, waterbodies or watercourses with chemicals or used container. Remove or cover all fish tanks and bowls before application. Cover all water storage tanks before application. For uk: all bats are protected under the wildlife and countryside act 1981. Before treating any structure used by bats, consult natural england, scottish natural heritage or the countryside council for wales. For ireland: all bats are protected under schedule 5 of the wildlife acts (1976 and 2000). Before treating any structure used by bats, consult the national parks and wildlife service. Hazardous to bees wash hands and exposed skin before meals and after use. Warning very toxic to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Avoid release to the environment. Collect spillage. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with national regulations. To avoid risks to man and the environment, comply with the instructions for use. Contains permethrin. May produce an allergic reaction. Manufacturer Contact Information Owen Street Coalville Le67 3De See more
